{{ill|Watatsumi|ja|綿津見神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Watatsumi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ワタツミ|1=Watatsumi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1474187}}
{{ill|Nasitomi-no-Mikoto|ja|梨津臣命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nasitomi-no-Mikoto|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 梨迹臣命|1=Nashitomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q108616765}} | Shrine_Rank = {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|qq=draft|1=Shikinaisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}} (minor) (disputed location)
Former {{ill|Village shrine|ja|村社|1=Son-sha|qid=Q134917284}}{{efn|Former shrine rank|lt=Son-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Village shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} | Established = (Legend) During the reign of [[:en:Emperor Sujin|Emperor Sujin]] | Main_hall = [[:en:Nagare-zukuri|Nagare-zukuri]] (single-bay structure) | Alternate_names = | Notable_shrines = | Festival = [[:en:April 8|April 8]] | Rituals = | location = {{ill|Nagahama|qid=Q844130}} | architecture_style = {{ill|nagare-zukuri|qid=Q210684}} }} '''Omi Shrine''' (乎彌神社, Omi Jinja) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[:en:Nagahama, Shiga|Nagahama]], Yogo Town, Shiga Prefecture, Japan. == Deities == * {{ill|Kochihito-no-Mikoto|ja|巨知人命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kochihito-no-Mikoto|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Watatsumi|ja|綿津見神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Watatsumi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ワタツミ|1=Watatsumi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1474187}} (Sea God) * {{ill|Nasitomi-no-Mikoto|ja|梨津臣命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nasitomi-no-Mikoto|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 梨迹臣命|1=Nashitomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q108616765}} (worshipped at {{ill|Noimi Shrine|ja|乃弥神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Noimi Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 乎彌神社|1=Omi Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11369800}}) == Shrine crest == * Left Mitsudomoe (三つ巴) == History == The shrine is traditionally said to have been founded during the reign of [[:en:Emperor Sujin|Emperor Sujin]]. It is identified as the small shrine "Omi Jinja" mentioned in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} for [[:en:Ika District, Shiga|Ika District]], [[:en:Ōmi Province|Omi Province]], and is classified as a {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|qq=draft|1=Shikinaisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}} (disputed location).Other possible locations for the shrine include {{ill|Omi Shrine (Nagahama)|ja|大見神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Omi Shrine (Nagahama)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in Kinomoto Town, Nagahama, and {{ill|Kasuga Shrine (Nagahama)|ja|春日神社 (長浜市高月町宇根)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga Shrine (Nagahama)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in Takatsuki Town, Nagahama. The shrine also enshrines the deities of the {{ill|Noimi Shrine|ja|乃弥神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Noimi Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 乎彌神社|1=Omi Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11369800}}, another {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|qq=draft|1=Shikinaisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}}. During the [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]], four shrines within the shrine parish—Murakusa Shrine, Hachiman Shrine, Daimyojin Shrine, and Seki Shrine—were relocated to the shrine grounds. It was designated as a {{ill|Village shrine|ja|村社|1=Son-sha|qid=Q134917284}}{{efn|Former shrine rank|lt=Son-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Village shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} under the old shrine Ranking system. == Festivals == * Main Festival: April 8 == Auxiliary shrines == * {{ill|Murakusa Shrine|ja|村草神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Murakusa Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Hachiman shrine|lt=Hachiman shrine|lt=Hachiman Shrine|ja|八幡神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 八幡宮}} * {{ill|Daimyojin Shrine|ja|大名持神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daimyojin Shrine|qq=|1=Ōnamochi Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q43594663}} * {{ill|Seki Shrine|ja|塞神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seki Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} == References == {{reflist}} == External links == * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1267 Omi Shrine] (Shiga Prefecture Shrine Association) {{ja icon}} {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{translated page|ja|乎彌神社|version=93048962|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Omi Province]] [[Category:Son-sha in Shiga Prefecture]] }} [[image:Omi-jinja.JPG|center|250px]] [[sn:Omi Shrine (Yogo)]] [[ja:乎彌神社]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:Buildings in Nagahama, Shiga]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]]

The shrine also enshrines the deities of the {{ill|Noimi Shrine|ja|乃弥神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Noimi Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 乎彌神社|1=Omi Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11369800}}, another {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|qq=draft|1=Shikinaisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}}. During the [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]], four shrines within the shrine parish—Murakusa Shrine, Hachiman Shrine, Daimyojin Shrine, and Seki Shrine—were relocated to the shrine grounds. It was designated as a {{ill|Village shrine|ja|村社|1=Son-sha|qid=Q134917284}}{{efn|Former shrine rank|lt=Son-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Village shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} under the old shrine Ranking system. == Festivals == * Main Festival: April 8 == Auxiliary shrines == * {{ill|Murakusa Shrine|ja|村草神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Murakusa Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Hachiman shrine|lt=Hachiman shrine|lt=Hachiman Shrine|ja|八幡神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 八幡宮}} * {{ill|Daimyojin Shrine|ja|大名持神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daimyojin Shrine|qq=|1=Ōnamochi Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q43594663}} * {{ill|Seki Shrine|ja|塞神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seki Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} == References == {{reflist}} == External links == * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1267 Omi Shrine] (Shiga Prefecture Shrine Association) {{ja icon}} {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{translated page|ja|乎彌神社|version=93048962|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Omi Province]] [[Category:Son-sha in Shiga Prefecture]] }} [[image:Omi-jinja.JPG|center|250px]] [[sn:Omi Shrine (Yogo)]] [[ja:乎彌神社]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:Buildings in Nagahama, Shiga]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]]

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11369800]] Wikidata name: Omi-jinja [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:46, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | name = Omi Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = File:Omi-jinja.JPG | location = [[:en:Shiga Prefecture|Shiga Prefecture]], [[:en:Nagahama, Shiga|Nagahama]], Yogo Town, Shimoyogo 2053 | coordinates = {{Coord|35.532361|N|136.204528|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} | deity = {{ill|Kochihito-no-Mikoto|ja|巨知人命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kochihito-no-Mikoto|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
{{ill|Watatsumi|ja|綿津見神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Watatsumi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ワタツミ|1=Watatsumi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1474187}}
{{ill|Nasitomi-no-Mikoto|ja|梨津臣命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nasitomi-no-Mikoto|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 梨迹臣命|1=Nashitomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q108616765}} | Shrine_Rank = {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|qq=draft|1=Shikinaisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}} (minor) (disputed location)
Former {{ill|Village shrine|ja|村社|1=Son-sha|qid=Q134917284}}{{efn|Former shrine rank|lt=Son-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Village shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} | Established = (Legend) During the reign of [[:en:Emperor Sujin|Emperor Sujin]] | Main_hall = [[:en:Nagare-zukuri|Nagare-zukuri]] (single-bay structure) | Alternate_names = | Notable_shrines = | Festival = [[:en:April 8|April 8]] | Rituals = | location = {{ill|Nagahama|qid=Q844130}} | architecture_style = {{ill|nagare-zukuri|qid=Q210684}} }} '''Omi Shrine''' (乎彌神社, Omi Jinja) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[:en:Nagahama, Shiga|Nagahama]], Yogo Town, Shiga Prefecture, Japan. == Deities == * {{ill|Kochihito-no-Mikoto|ja|巨知人命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kochihito-no-Mikoto|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Watatsumi|ja|綿津見神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Watatsumi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ワタツミ|1=Watatsumi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1474187}} (Sea God) * {{ill|Nasitomi-no-Mikoto|ja|梨津臣命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nasitomi-no-Mikoto|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 梨迹臣命|1=Nashitomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q108616765}} (worshipped at {{ill|Noimi Shrine|ja|乃弥神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Noimi Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 乎彌神社|1=Omi Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11369800}}) == Shrine crest == * Left Mitsudomoe (三つ巴) == History == The shrine is traditionally said to have been founded during the reign of [[:en:Emperor Sujin|Emperor Sujin]]. It is identified as the small shrine "Omi Jinja" mentioned in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} for [[:en:Ika District, Shiga|Ika District]], [[:en:Ōmi Province|Omi Province]], and is classified as a {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|qq=draft|1=Shikinaisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}} (disputed location).Other possible locations for the shrine include {{ill|Omi Shrine (Nagahama)|ja|大見神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Omi Shrine (Nagahama)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in Kinomoto Town, Nagahama, and {{ill|Kasuga Shrine (Nagahama)|ja|春日神社 (長浜市高月町宇根)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga Shrine (Nagahama)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in Takatsuki Town, Nagahama. The shrine also enshrines the deities of the {{ill|Noimi Shrine|ja|乃弥神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Noimi Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 乎彌神社|1=Omi Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11369800}}, another {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|qq=draft|1=Shikinaisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}}. During the [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]], four shrines within the shrine parish—Murakusa Shrine, Hachiman Shrine, Daimyojin Shrine, and Seki Shrine—were relocated to the shrine grounds. It was designated as a {{ill|Village shrine|ja|村社|1=Son-sha|qid=Q134917284}}{{efn|Former shrine rank|lt=Son-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Village shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} under the old shrine Ranking system. == Festivals == * Main Festival: April 8 == Auxiliary shrines == * {{ill|Murakusa Shrine|ja|村草神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Murakusa Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Hachiman shrine|lt=Hachiman shrine|lt=Hachiman Shrine|ja|八幡神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 八幡宮}} * {{ill|Daimyojin Shrine|ja|大名持神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daimyojin Shrine|qq=|1=Ōnamochi Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q43594663}} * {{ill|Seki Shrine|ja|塞神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seki Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} == References == {{reflist}} == External links == * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1267 Omi Shrine] (Shiga Prefecture Shrine Association) {{ja icon}} {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{translated page|ja|乎彌神社|version=93048962|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Omi Province]] [[Category:Son-sha in Shiga Prefecture]] }} [[image:Omi-jinja.JPG|center|250px]] [[sn:Omi Shrine (Yogo)]] [[ja:乎彌神社]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:Buildings in Nagahama, Shiga]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]]

Former {{ill|Village shrine|ja|村社|1=Son-sha|qid=Q134917284}}{{efn|Former shrine rank|lt=Son-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Village shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} | Established = (Legend) During the reign of [[:en:Emperor Sujin|Emperor Sujin]] | Main_hall = [[:en:Nagare-zukuri|Nagare-zukuri]] (single-bay structure) | Alternate_names = | Notable_shrines = | Festival = [[:en:April 8|April 8]] | Rituals = | location = {{ill|Nagahama|qid=Q844130}} | architecture_style = {{ill|nagare-zukuri|qid=Q210684}} }} '''Omi Shrine''' (乎彌神社, Omi Jinja) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[:en:Nagahama, Shiga|Nagahama]], Yogo Town, Shiga Prefecture, Japan. == Deities == * {{ill|Kochihito-no-Mikoto|ja|巨知人命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kochihito-no-Mikoto|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Watatsumi|ja|綿津見神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Watatsumi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ワタツミ|1=Watatsumi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1474187}} (Sea God) * {{ill|Nasitomi-no-Mikoto|ja|梨津臣命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nasitomi-no-Mikoto|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 梨迹臣命|1=Nashitomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q108616765}} (worshipped at {{ill|Noimi Shrine|ja|乃弥神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Noimi Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 乎彌神社|1=Omi Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11369800}}) == Shrine crest == * Left Mitsudomoe (三つ巴) == History == The shrine is traditionally said to have been founded during the reign of [[:en:Emperor Sujin|Emperor Sujin]]. It is identified as the small shrine "Omi Jinja" mentioned in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} for [[:en:Ika District, Shiga|Ika District]], [[:en:Ōmi Province|Omi Province]], and is classified as a {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|qq=draft|1=Shikinaisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}} (disputed location).Other possible locations for the shrine include {{ill|Omi Shrine (Nagahama)|ja|大見神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Omi Shrine (Nagahama)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in Kinomoto Town, Nagahama, and {{ill|Kasuga Shrine (Nagahama)|ja|春日神社 (長浜市高月町宇根)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga Shrine (Nagahama)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in Takatsuki Town, Nagahama. The shrine also enshrines the deities of the {{ill|Noimi Shrine|ja|乃弥神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Noimi Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 乎彌神社|1=Omi Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11369800}}, another {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|qq=draft|1=Shikinaisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}}. During the [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]], four shrines within the shrine parish—Murakusa Shrine, Hachiman Shrine, Daimyojin Shrine, and Seki Shrine—were relocated to the shrine grounds. It was designated as a {{ill|Village shrine|ja|村社|1=Son-sha|qid=Q134917284}}{{efn|Former shrine rank|lt=Son-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Village shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} under the old shrine Ranking system. == Festivals == * Main Festival: April 8 == Auxiliary shrines == * {{ill|Murakusa Shrine|ja|村草神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Murakusa Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Hachiman shrine|lt=Hachiman shrine|lt=Hachiman Shrine|ja|八幡神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 八幡宮}} * {{ill|Daimyojin Shrine|ja|大名持神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daimyojin Shrine|qq=|1=Ōnamochi Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q43594663}} * {{ill|Seki Shrine|ja|塞神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seki Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} == References == {{reflist}} == External links == * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1267 Omi Shrine] (Shiga Prefecture Shrine Association) {{ja icon}} {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{translated page|ja|乎彌神社|version=93048962|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Omi Province]] [[Category:Son-sha in Shiga Prefecture]] }} [[image:Omi-jinja.JPG|center|250px]] [[sn:Omi Shrine (Yogo)]] [[ja:乎彌神社]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:Buildings in Nagahama, Shiga]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]]

It is identified as the small shrine "Omi Jinja" mentioned in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} for [[:en:Ika District, Shiga|Ika District]], [[:en:Ōmi Province|Omi Province]], and is classified as a {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|qq=draft|1=Shikinaisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}} (disputed location).Other possible locations for the shrine include {{ill|Omi Shrine (Nagahama)|ja|大見神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Omi Shrine (Nagahama)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in Kinomoto Town, Nagahama, and {{ill|Kasuga Shrine (Nagahama)|ja|春日神社 (長浜市高月町宇根)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga Shrine (Nagahama)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in Takatsuki Town, Nagahama. The shrine also enshrines the deities of the {{ill|Noimi Shrine|ja|乃弥神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Noimi Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 乎彌神社|1=Omi Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11369800}}, another {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|qq=draft|1=Shikinaisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}}. During the [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]], four shrines within the shrine parish—Murakusa Shrine, Hachiman Shrine, Daimyojin Shrine, and Seki Shrine—were relocated to the shrine grounds. It was designated as a {{ill|Village shrine|ja|村社|1=Son-sha|qid=Q134917284}}{{efn|Former shrine rank|lt=Son-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Village shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} under the old shrine Ranking system. == Festivals == * Main Festival: April 8 == Auxiliary shrines == * {{ill|Murakusa Shrine|ja|村草神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Murakusa Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Hachiman shrine|lt=Hachiman shrine|lt=Hachiman Shrine|ja|八幡神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 八幡宮}} * {{ill|Daimyojin Shrine|ja|大名持神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daimyojin Shrine|qq=|1=Ōnamochi Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q43594663}} * {{ill|Seki Shrine|ja|塞神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seki Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} == References == {{reflist}} == External links == * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1267 Omi Shrine] (Shiga Prefecture Shrine Association) {{ja icon}} {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{translated page|ja|乎彌神社|version=93048962|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Omi Province]] [[Category:Son-sha in Shiga Prefecture]] }} [[image:Omi-jinja.JPG|center|250px]] [[ja:乎彌神社]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:Buildings in Nagahama, Shiga]] {{wikidata link|Q11369800}}

The shrine also enshrines the deities of the {{ill|Noimi Shrine|ja|乃弥神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Noimi Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 乎彌神社|1=Omi Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11369800}}, another {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|qq=draft|1=Shikinaisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}}. During the [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]], four shrines within the shrine parish—Murakusa Shrine, Hachiman Shrine, Daimyojin Shrine, and Seki Shrine—were relocated to the shrine grounds. It was designated as a {{ill|Village shrine|ja|村社|1=Son-sha|WD=Q134917284}}{{efn|Former shrine rank|lt=Son-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Village shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} under the old shrine Ranking system. == Festivals == * Main Festival: April 8 == Auxiliary shrines == * {{ill|Murakusa Shrine|ja|村草神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Murakusa Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Hachiman shrine|lt=Hachiman shrine|lt=Hachiman Shrine|ja|八幡神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 八幡宮}} * {{ill|Daimyojin Shrine|ja|大名持神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daimyojin Shrine|qq=|1=Ōnamochi Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q43594663}} * {{ill|Seki Shrine|ja|塞神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seki Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} == References == {{reflist}} == External links == * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1267 Omi Shrine] (Shiga Prefecture Shrine Association) {{ja icon}} {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{translated page|ja|乎彌神社|version=93048962|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Omi Province]] [[Category:Son-sha in Shiga Prefecture]] }} [[image:Omi-jinja.JPG|center|250px]] [[ja:乎彌神社]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:Buildings in Nagahama, Shiga]] {{wikidata link|Q11369800}}

revision.text:
[[ja:乎彌神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11369800]] Wikidata name: Omi-jinja [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:46, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | name = Omi Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = File:Omi-jinja.JPG | location = [[:en:Shiga Prefecture|Shiga Prefecture]], [[:en:Nagahama, Shiga|Nagahama]], Yogo Town, Shimoyogo 2053 | coordinates = {{Coord|35.532361|N|136.204528|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} | deity = {{ill|Kochihito-no-Mikoto|ja|巨知人命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kochihito-no-Mikoto|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
{{ill|Watatsumi|ja|綿津見神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Watatsumi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ワタツミ|1=Watatsumi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1474187}}
{{ill|Nasitomi-no-Mikoto|ja|梨津臣命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nasitomi-no-Mikoto|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 梨迹臣命|1=Nashitomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q108616765}} | Shrine_Rank = {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|qq=draft|1=Shikinaisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}} (minor) (disputed location)
Former {{ill|Village shrine|ja|村社|1=Son-sha|WD=Q134917284}}{{efn|Former shrine rank|lt=Son-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Village shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} | Established = (Legend) During the reign of [[:en:Emperor Sujin|Emperor Sujin]] | Main_hall = [[:en:Nagare-zukuri|Nagare-zukuri]] (single-bay structure) | Alternate_names = | Notable_shrines = | Festival = [[:en:April 8|April 8]] | Rituals = | location = {{ill|Nagahama|WD=Q844130}} | architecture_style = {{ill|nagare-zukuri|WD=Q210684}} }} '''Omi Shrine''' (乎彌神社, Omi Jinja) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[:en:Nagahama, Shiga|Nagahama]], Yogo Town, Shiga Prefecture, Japan. == Deities == * {{ill|Kochihito-no-Mikoto|ja|巨知人命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kochihito-no-Mikoto|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Watatsumi|ja|綿津見神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Watatsumi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ワタツミ|1=Watatsumi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1474187}} (Sea God) * {{ill|Nasitomi-no-Mikoto|ja|梨津臣命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nasitomi-no-Mikoto|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 梨迹臣命|1=Nashitomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q108616765}} (worshipped at {{ill|Noimi Shrine|ja|乃弥神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Noimi Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 乎彌神社|1=Omi Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11369800}}) == Shrine crest == * Left Mitsudomoe (三つ巴) == History == The shrine is traditionally said to have been founded during the reign of [[:en:Emperor Sujin|Emperor Sujin]]. It is identified as the small shrine "Omi Jinja" mentioned in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} for [[:en:Ika District, Shiga|Ika District]], [[:en:Ōmi Province|Omi Province]], and is classified as a {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|qq=draft|1=Shikinaisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}} (disputed location).Other possible locations for the shrine include {{ill|Omi Shrine (Nagahama)|ja|大見神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Omi Shrine (Nagahama)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in Kinomoto Town, Nagahama, and {{ill|Kasuga Shrine (Nagahama)|ja|春日神社 (長浜市高月町宇根)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga Shrine (Nagahama)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in Takatsuki Town, Nagahama. The shrine also enshrines the deities of the {{ill|Noimi Shrine|ja|乃弥神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Noimi Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 乎彌神社|1=Omi Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11369800}}, another {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|qq=draft|1=Shikinaisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}}. During the [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]], four shrines within the shrine parish—Murakusa Shrine, Hachiman Shrine, Daimyojin Shrine, and Seki Shrine—were relocated to the shrine grounds. It was designated as a {{ill|Village shrine|ja|村社|1=Son-sha|WD=Q134917284}}{{efn|Former shrine rank|lt=Son-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Village shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} under the old shrine Ranking system. == Festivals == * Main Festival: April 8 == Auxiliary shrines == * {{ill|Murakusa Shrine|ja|村草神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Murakusa Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Hachiman shrine|lt=Hachiman shrine|lt=Hachiman Shrine|ja|八幡神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 八幡宮}} * {{ill|Daimyojin Shrine|ja|大名持神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daimyojin Shrine|qq=|1=Ōnamochi Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q43594663}} * {{ill|Seki Shrine|ja|塞神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seki Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} == References == {{reflist}} == External links == * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1267 Omi Shrine] (Shiga Prefecture Shrine Association) {{ja icon}} {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{translated page|ja|乎彌神社|version=93048962|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Omi Province]] [[Category:Son-sha in Shiga Prefecture]] }} [[image:Omi-jinja.JPG|center|250px]] [[ja:乎彌神社]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:Buildings in Nagahama, Shiga]] {{wikidata link|Q11369800}}

{{ill|Nasitomi-no-Mikoto|ja|梨津臣命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nasitomi-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 梨迹臣命|1=Nashitomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q108616765}} | Shrine_Rank = {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|1=Shikinaisha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}} (minor) (disputed location)
Former {{ill|Village shrine|ja|村社|1=Son-sha|WD=Q134917284}}{{efn|Former shrine rank|lt=Son-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Village shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} | Established = (Legend) During the reign of [[:en:Emperor Sujin|Emperor Sujin]] | Main_hall = [[:en:Nagare-zukuri|Nagare-zukuri]] (single-bay structure) | Alternate_names = | Notable_shrines = | Festival = [[:en:April 8|April 8]] | Rituals = | location = {{ill|Nagahama|WD=Q844130}} | architecture_style = {{ill|nagare-zukuri|WD=Q210684}} }} '''Omi Shrine''' (乎彌神社, Omi Jinja) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[:en:Nagahama, Shiga|Nagahama]], Yogo Town, Shiga Prefecture, Japan. == Deities == * {{ill|Kochihito-no-Mikoto|ja|巨知人命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kochihito-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Watatsumi|ja|綿津見神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Watatsumi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ワタツミ|1=Watatsumi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1474187}} (Sea God) * {{ill|Nasitomi-no-Mikoto|ja|梨津臣命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nasitomi-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 梨迹臣命|1=Nashitomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q108616765}} (worshipped at {{ill|Noimi Shrine|ja|乃弥神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Noimi Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 乎彌神社|1=Omi Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11369800}}) == Shrine crest == * Left Mitsudomoe (三つ巴) == History == The shrine is traditionally said to have been founded during the reign of [[:en:Emperor Sujin|Emperor Sujin]]. It is identified as the small shrine "Omi Jinja" mentioned in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} for [[:en:Ika District, Shiga|Ika District]], [[:en:Ōmi Province|Omi Province]], and is classified as a {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|1=Shikinaisha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}} (disputed location).Other possible locations for the shrine include {{ill|Omi Shrine (Nagahama)|ja|大見神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Omi Shrine (Nagahama)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in Kinomoto Town, Nagahama, and {{ill|Kasuga Shrine (Nagahama)|ja|春日神社 (長浜市高月町宇根)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga Shrine (Nagahama)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in Takatsuki Town, Nagahama. The shrine also enshrines the deities of the {{ill|Noimi Shrine|ja|乃弥神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Noimi Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 乎彌神社|1=Omi Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11369800}}, another {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|1=Shikinaisha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}}. During the [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]], four shrines within the shrine parish—Murakusa Shrine, Hachiman Shrine, Daimyojin Shrine, and Seki Shrine—were relocated to the shrine grounds. It was designated as a {{ill|Village shrine|ja|村社|1=Son-sha|WD=Q134917284}}{{efn|Former shrine rank|lt=Son-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Village shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} under the old shrine Ranking system. == Festivals == * Main Festival: April 8 == Auxiliary shrines == * {{ill|Murakusa Shrine|ja|村草神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Murakusa Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Hachiman shrine|lt=Hachiman shrine|lt=Hachiman Shrine|ja|八幡神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 八幡宮}} * {{ill|Daimyojin Shrine|ja|大名持神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daimyojin Shrine|1=Ōnamochi Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q43594663}} * {{ill|Seki Shrine|ja|塞神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seki Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} == References == {{reflist}} == External links == * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1267 Omi Shrine] (Shiga Prefecture Shrine Association) {{ja icon}} {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{translated page|ja|乎彌神社|version=93048962|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Omi Province]] [[Category:Son-sha in Shiga Prefecture]] }} [[image:Omi-jinja.JPG|center|250px]] [[ja:乎彌神社]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:Buildings in Nagahama, Shiga]] {{wikidata link|Q11369800}}

During the [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]], four shrines within the shrine parish—Murakusa Shrine, Hachiman Shrine, Daimyojin Shrine, and Seki Shrine—were relocated to the shrine grounds. [[ja:乎彌神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11369800]] Wikidata name: Omi-jinja [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:46, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | name = Omi Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = File:Omi-jinja.JPG | location = [[:en:Shiga Prefecture|Shiga Prefecture]], [[:en:Nagahama, Shiga|Nagahama]], Yogo Town, Shimoyogo 2053 | coordinates = {{Coord|35.532361|N|136.204528|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} | deity = {{ill|Kochihito-no-Mikoto|ja|巨知人命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kochihito-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
{{ill|Watatsumi|ja|綿津見神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Watatsumi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ワタツミ|1=Watatsumi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1474187}}
{{ill|Nasitomi-no-Mikoto|ja|梨津臣命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nasitomi-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 梨迹臣命|1=Nashitomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q108616765}} | Shrine_Rank = {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|1=Shikinaisha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}} (minor) (disputed location)
Former {{ill|Village shrine|ja|村社|1=Son-sha|WD=Q134917284}}{{efn|Former shrine rank|lt=Son-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Village shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} | Established = (Legend) During the reign of [[:en:Emperor Sujin|Emperor Sujin]] | Main_hall = [[:en:Nagare-zukuri|Nagare-zukuri]] (single-bay structure) | Alternate_names = | Notable_shrines = | Festival = [[:en:April 8|April 8]] | Rituals = | location = {{ill|Nagahama|WD=Q844130}} | architecture_style = {{ill|nagare-zukuri|WD=Q210684}} }} '''Omi Shrine''' (乎彌神社, Omi Jinja) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[:en:Nagahama, Shiga|Nagahama]], Yogo Town, Shiga Prefecture, Japan. == Deities == * {{ill|Kochihito-no-Mikoto|ja|巨知人命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kochihito-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Watatsumi|ja|綿津見神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Watatsumi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ワタツミ|1=Watatsumi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1474187}} (Sea God) * {{ill|Nasitomi-no-Mikoto|ja|梨津臣命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nasitomi-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 梨迹臣命|1=Nashitomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q108616765}} (worshipped at {{ill|Noimi Shrine|ja|乃弥神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Noimi Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 乎彌神社|1=Omi Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11369800}}) == Shrine crest == * Left Mitsudomoe (三つ巴) == History == The shrine is traditionally said to have been founded during the reign of [[:en:Emperor Sujin|Emperor Sujin]]. It is identified as the small shrine "Omi Jinja" mentioned in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} for [[:en:Ika District, Shiga|Ika District]], [[:en:Ōmi Province|Omi Province]], and is classified as a {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|1=Shikinaisha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}} (disputed location).Other possible locations for the shrine include {{ill|Omi Shrine (Nagahama)|ja|大見神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Omi Shrine (Nagahama)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in Kinomoto Town, Nagahama, and {{ill|Kasuga Shrine (Nagahama)|ja|春日神社 (長浜市高月町宇根)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga Shrine (Nagahama)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in Takatsuki Town, Nagahama. The shrine also enshrines the deities of the {{ill|Noimi Shrine|ja|乃弥神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Noimi Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 乎彌神社|1=Omi Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11369800}}, another {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|1=Shikinaisha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}}. During the [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]], four shrines within the shrine parish—Murakusa Shrine, Hachiman Shrine, Daimyojin Shrine, and Seki Shrine—were relocated to the shrine grounds. It was designated as a {{ill|Village shrine|ja|村社|1=Son-sha|WD=Q134917284}}{{efn|Former shrine rank|lt=Son-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Village shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} under the old shrine Ranking system. == Festivals == * Main Festival: April 8 == Auxiliary shrines == * {{ill|Murakusa Shrine|ja|村草神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Murakusa Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Hachiman shrine|lt=Hachiman shrine|lt=Hachiman Shrine|ja|八幡神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 八幡宮}} * {{ill|Daimyojin Shrine|ja|大名持神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daimyojin Shrine|1=Ōnamochi Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q43594663}} * {{ill|Seki Shrine|ja|塞神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seki Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} == References == {{reflist}} == External links == * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1267 Omi Shrine] (Shiga Prefecture Shrine Association) {{ja icon}} {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{translated page|ja|乎彌神社|version=93048962|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Omi Province]] [[Category:Son-sha in Shiga Prefecture]] }} [[image:Omi-jinja.JPG|center|250px]] [[ja:乎彌神社]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:Buildings in Nagahama, Shiga]] {{wikidata link|Q11369800}} [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]]

It is identified as the small shrine "Omi Jinja" mentioned in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} for [[:en:Ika District, Shiga|Ika District]], [[:en:Ōmi Province|Omi Province]], and is classified as a {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|1=Shikinaisha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}} (disputed location).Other possible locations for the shrine include {{ill|Omi Shrine (Nagahama)|ja|大見神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Omi Shrine (Nagahama)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in Kinomoto Town, Nagahama, and {{ill|Kasuga Shrine (Nagahama)|ja|春日神社 (長浜市高月町宇根)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga Shrine (Nagahama)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in Takatsuki Town, Nagahama. The shrine also enshrines the deities of the {{ill|Noimi Shrine|ja|乃弥神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Noimi Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 乎彌神社|1=Omi Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11369800}}, another {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|1=Shikinaisha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}}. During the [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]], four shrines within the shrine parish—Murakusa Shrine, Hachiman Shrine, Daimyojin Shrine, and Seki Shrine—were relocated to the shrine grounds. It was designated as a {{ill|Village shrine|ja|村社|1=Son-sha|WD=Q134917284}}{{efn|Former shrine rank|lt=Son-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Village shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} under the old shrine Ranking system. == Festivals == * Main Festival: April 8 == Auxiliary shrines == * {{ill|Murakusa Shrine|ja|村草神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Murakusa Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Hachiman shrine|lt=Hachiman shrine|lt=Hachiman Shrine|ja|八幡神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 八幡宮}} * {{ill|Daimyojin Shrine|ja|大名持神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daimyojin Shrine|1=Ōnamochi Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q43594663}} * {{ill|Seki Shrine|ja|塞神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seki Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} == References == {{reflist}} == External links == * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1267 Omi Shrine] (Shiga Prefecture Shrine Association) {{ja icon}} {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{translated page|ja|乎彌神社|version=93048962|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Omi Province]] [[Category:Son-sha in Shiga Prefecture]] }} [[image:Omi-jinja.JPG|center|250px]] [[ja:乎彌神社]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:Buildings in Nagahama, Shiga]] {{wikidata link|Q11369800}} [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]]

{{ill|Watatsumi|ja|綿津見神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Watatsumi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ワタツミ|1=Watatsumi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1474187}}
{{ill|Nasitomi-no-Mikoto|ja|梨津臣命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nasitomi-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 梨迹臣命|1=Nashitomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q108616765}} | Shrine_Rank = {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|1=Shikinaisha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}} (minor) (disputed location)
Former {{ill|Village shrine|ja|村社|1=Son-sha|WD=Q134917284}}{{efn|Former shrine rank|lt=Son-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Village shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} | Established = (Legend) During the reign of [[:en:Emperor Sujin|Emperor Sujin]] | Main_hall = [[:en:Nagare-zukuri|Nagare-zukuri]] (single-bay structure) | Alternate_names = | Notable_shrines = | Festival = [[:en:April 8|April 8]] | Rituals = | location = {{ill|Nagahama|WD=Q844130}} | architecture_style = {{ill|nagare-zukuri|WD=Q210684}} }} '''Omi Shrine''' (乎彌神社, Omi Jinja) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[:en:Nagahama, Shiga|Nagahama]], Yogo Town, Shiga Prefecture, Japan. == Deities == * {{ill|Kochihito-no-Mikoto|ja|巨知人命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kochihito-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Watatsumi|ja|綿津見神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Watatsumi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ワタツミ|1=Watatsumi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1474187}} (Sea God) * {{ill|Nasitomi-no-Mikoto|ja|梨津臣命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nasitomi-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 梨迹臣命|1=Nashitomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q108616765}} (worshipped at {{ill|Noimi Shrine|ja|乃弥神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Noimi Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 乎彌神社|1=Omi Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11369800}}) == Shrine crest == * Left Mitsudomoe (三つ巴) == History == The shrine is traditionally said to have been founded during the reign of [[:en:Emperor Sujin|Emperor Sujin]]. It is identified as the small shrine "Omi Jinja" mentioned in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} for [[:en:Ika District, Shiga|Ika District]], [[:en:Ōmi Province|Omi Province]], and is classified as a {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|1=Shikinaisha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}} (disputed location).Other possible locations for the shrine include {{ill|Omi Shrine (Nagahama)|ja|大見神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Omi Shrine (Nagahama)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in Kinomoto Town, Nagahama, and {{ill|Kasuga Shrine (Nagahama)|ja|春日神社 (長浜市高月町宇根)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga Shrine (Nagahama)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in Takatsuki Town, Nagahama. The shrine also enshrines the deities of the {{ill|Noimi Shrine|ja|乃弥神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Noimi Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 乎彌神社|1=Omi Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11369800}}, another {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|1=Shikinaisha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}}. During the [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]], four shrines within the shrine parish—Murakusa Shrine, Hachiman Shrine, Daimyojin Shrine, and Seki Shrine—were relocated to the shrine grounds. It was designated as a {{ill|Village shrine|ja|村社|1=Son-sha|WD=Q134917284}}{{efn|Former shrine rank|lt=Son-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Village shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} under the old shrine Ranking system. == Festivals == * Main Festival: April 8 == Auxiliary shrines == * {{ill|Murakusa Shrine|ja|村草神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Murakusa Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Hachiman shrine|lt=Hachiman shrine|lt=Hachiman Shrine|ja|八幡神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 八幡宮}} * {{ill|Daimyojin Shrine|ja|大名持神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daimyojin Shrine|1=Ōnamochi Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q43594663}} * {{ill|Seki Shrine|ja|塞神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seki Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} == References == {{reflist}} == External links == * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1267 Omi Shrine] (Shiga Prefecture Shrine Association) {{ja icon}} {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{translated page|ja|乎彌神社|version=93048962|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Omi Province]] [[Category:Son-sha in Shiga Prefecture]] }} [[image:Omi-jinja.JPG|center|250px]] [[ja:乎彌神社]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:Buildings in Nagahama, Shiga]] {{wikidata link|Q11369800}} [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]] {{wikidata link|Q1}} {{wikidata link|Q1}}

Former {{ill|Village shrine|ja|村社|1=Son-sha|WD=Q134917284}}{{efn|Former shrine rank|lt=Son-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Village shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} | Established = (Legend) During the reign of [[:en:Emperor Sujin|Emperor Sujin]] | Main_hall = [[:en:Nagare-zukuri|Nagare-zukuri]] (single-bay structure) | Alternate_names = | Notable_shrines = | Festival = [[:en:April 8|April 8]] | Rituals = | location = {{ill|Nagahama|WD=Q844130}} | architecture_style = {{ill|nagare-zukuri|WD=Q210684}} }} '''Omi Shrine''' (乎彌神社, Omi Jinja) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[:en:Nagahama, Shiga|Nagahama]], Yogo Town, Shiga Prefecture, Japan. == Deities == * {{ill|Kochihito-no-Mikoto|ja|巨知人命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kochihito-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Watatsumi|ja|綿津見神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Watatsumi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ワタツミ|1=Watatsumi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1474187}} (Sea God) * {{ill|Nasitomi-no-Mikoto|ja|梨津臣命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nasitomi-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 梨迹臣命|1=Nashitomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q108616765}} (worshipped at {{ill|Noimi Shrine|ja|乃弥神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Noimi Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 乎彌神社|1=Omi Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11369800}}) == Shrine crest == * Left Mitsudomoe (三つ巴) == History == The shrine is traditionally said to have been founded during the reign of [[:en:Emperor Sujin|Emperor Sujin]]. It is identified as the small shrine "Omi Jinja" mentioned in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} for [[:en:Ika District, Shiga|Ika District]], [[:en:Ōmi Province|Omi Province]], and is classified as a {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|1=Shikinaisha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}} (disputed location).Other possible locations for the shrine include {{ill|Omi Shrine (Nagahama)|ja|大見神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Omi Shrine (Nagahama)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in Kinomoto Town, Nagahama, and {{ill|Kasuga Shrine (Nagahama)|ja|春日神社 (長浜市高月町宇根)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga Shrine (Nagahama)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in Takatsuki Town, Nagahama. The shrine also enshrines the deities of the {{ill|Noimi Shrine|ja|乃弥神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Noimi Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 乎彌神社|1=Omi Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11369800}}, another {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|1=Shikinaisha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}}. During the [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]], four shrines within the shrine parish—Murakusa Shrine, Hachiman Shrine, Daimyojin Shrine, and Seki Shrine—were relocated to the shrine grounds. It was designated as a {{ill|Village shrine|ja|村社|1=Son-sha|WD=Q134917284}}{{efn|Former shrine rank|lt=Son-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Village shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} under the old shrine Ranking system. == Festivals == * Main Festival: April 8 == Auxiliary shrines == * {{ill|Murakusa Shrine|ja|村草神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Murakusa Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Hachiman shrine|lt=Hachiman shrine|lt=Hachiman Shrine|ja|八幡神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 八幡宮}} * {{ill|Daimyojin Shrine|ja|大名持神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daimyojin Shrine|1=Ōnamochi Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q43594663}} * {{ill|Seki Shrine|ja|塞神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seki Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} == References == {{reflist}} == External links == * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1267 Omi Shrine] (Shiga Prefecture Shrine Association) {{ja icon}} {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{translated page|ja|乎彌神社|version=93048962|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Omi Province]] [[Category:Son-sha in Shiga Prefecture]] }} [[image:Omi-jinja.JPG|center|250px]] [[ja:乎彌神社]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:Buildings in Nagahama, Shiga]] {{wikidata link|Q11369800}} [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]] {{wikidata link|Q1}} {{wikidata link|Q1}} {{wikidata link|Q1}} {{wikidata link|Q1}}

[[ja:乎彌神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11369800]] Wikidata name: Omi-jinja [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:46, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | name = Omi Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = File:Omi-jinja.JPG | location = [[:en:Shiga Prefecture|Shiga Prefecture]], [[:en:Nagahama, Shiga|Nagahama]], Yogo Town, Shimoyogo 2053 | coordinates = {{Coord|35.532361|N|136.204528|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} | deity = {{ill|Kochihito-no-Mikoto|ja|巨知人命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kochihito-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
{{ill|Watatsumi|ja|綿津見神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Watatsumi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ワタツミ|1=Watatsumi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1474187}}
{{ill|Nasitomi-no-Mikoto|ja|梨津臣命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nasitomi-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 梨迹臣命|1=Nashitomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q108616765}} | Shrine_Rank = {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|1=Shikinaisha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}} (minor) (disputed location)
Former {{ill|Village shrine|ja|村社|1=Son-sha|WD=Q134917284}}{{efn|Former shrine rank|lt=Son-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Village shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} | Established = (Legend) During the reign of [[:en:Emperor Sujin|Emperor Sujin]] | Main_hall = [[:en:Nagare-zukuri|Nagare-zukuri]] (single-bay structure) | Alternate_names = | Notable_shrines = | Festival = [[:en:April 8|April 8]] | Rituals = | location = {{ill|Nagahama|WD=Q844130}} | architecture_style = {{ill|nagare-zukuri|WD=Q210684}} }} '''Omi Shrine''' (乎彌神社, Omi Jinja) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[:en:Nagahama, Shiga|Nagahama]], Yogo Town, Shiga Prefecture, Japan. == Deities == * {{ill|Kochihito-no-Mikoto|ja|巨知人命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kochihito-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Watatsumi|ja|綿津見神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Watatsumi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ワタツミ|1=Watatsumi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1474187}} (Sea God) * {{ill|Nasitomi-no-Mikoto|ja|梨津臣命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nasitomi-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 梨迹臣命|1=Nashitomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q108616765}} (worshipped at {{ill|Noimi Shrine|ja|乃弥神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Noimi Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 乎彌神社|1=Omi Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11369800}}) == Shrine crest == * Left Mitsudomoe (三つ巴) == History == The shrine is traditionally said to have been founded during the reign of [[:en:Emperor Sujin|Emperor Sujin]]. It is identified as the small shrine "Omi Jinja" mentioned in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} for [[:en:Ika District, Shiga|Ika District]], [[:en:Ōmi Province|Omi Province]], and is classified as a {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|1=Shikinaisha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}} (disputed location).Other possible locations for the shrine include {{ill|Omi Shrine (Nagahama)|ja|大見神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Omi Shrine (Nagahama)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in Kinomoto Town, Nagahama, and {{ill|Kasuga Shrine (Nagahama)|ja|春日神社 (長浜市高月町宇根)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga Shrine (Nagahama)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in Takatsuki Town, Nagahama. The shrine also enshrines the deities of the {{ill|Noimi Shrine|ja|乃弥神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Noimi Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 乎彌神社|1=Omi Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11369800}}, another {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|1=Shikinaisha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}}. During the [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]], four shrines within the shrine parish—Murakusa Shrine, Hachiman Shrine, Daimyojin Shrine, and Seki Shrine—were relocated to the shrine grounds. It was designated as a {{ill|Village shrine|ja|村社|1=Son-sha|WD=Q134917284}}{{efn|Former shrine rank|lt=Son-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Village shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} under the old shrine Ranking system. == Festivals == * Main Festival: April 8 == Auxiliary shrines == * {{ill|Murakusa Shrine|ja|村草神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Murakusa Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Hachiman shrine|lt=Hachiman shrine|lt=Hachiman Shrine|ja|八幡神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 八幡宮}} * {{ill|Daimyojin Shrine|ja|大名持神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daimyojin Shrine|1=Ōnamochi Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q43594663}} * {{ill|Seki Shrine|ja|塞神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seki Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} == References == {{reflist}} == It was designated as a {{ill|Village shrine|ja|村社|1=Son-sha|WD=Q134917284}}{{efn|Former shrine rank|lt=Son-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Village shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} under the old shrine Ranking system. == Festivals == * Main Festival: April 8 == Auxiliary shrines == [[ja:乎彌神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11369800]] Wikidata name: Omi-jinja [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:46, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | name = Omi Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = File:Omi-jinja.JPG | location = [[:en:Shiga Prefecture|Shiga Prefecture]], [[:en:Nagahama, Shiga|Nagahama]], Yogo Town, Shimoyogo 2053 | coordinates = {{Coord|35.532361|N|136.204528|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} | deity = {{ill|Kochihito-no-Mikoto|ja|巨知人命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kochihito-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
{{ill|Watatsumi|ja|綿津見神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Watatsumi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ワタツミ|1=Watatsumi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1474187}}
{{ill|Nasitomi-no-Mikoto|ja|梨津臣命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nasitomi-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 梨迹臣命|1=Nashitomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q108616765}} | Shrine_Rank = {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|1=Shikinaisha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}} (minor) (disputed location)
Former {{ill|Village shrine|ja|村社|1=Son-sha|WD=Q134917284}}{{efn|Former shrine rank|lt=Son-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Village shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} | Established = (Legend) During the reign of [[:en:Emperor Sujin|Emperor Sujin]] | Main_hall = [[:en:Nagare-zukuri|Nagare-zukuri]] (single-bay structure) | Alternate_names = | Notable_shrines = | Festival = [[:en:April 8|April 8]] | Rituals = | location = {{ill|Nagahama|WD=Q844130}} | architecture_style = {{ill|nagare-zukuri|WD=Q210684}} }} '''Omi Shrine''' (乎彌神社, Omi Jinja) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[:en:Nagahama, Shiga|Nagahama]], Yogo Town, Shiga Prefecture, Japan. == Deities == * {{ill|Kochihito-no-Mikoto|ja|巨知人命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kochihito-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Watatsumi|ja|綿津見神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Watatsumi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ワタツミ|1=Watatsumi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1474187}} (Sea God) * {{ill|Nasitomi-no-Mikoto|ja|梨津臣命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nasitomi-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 梨迹臣命|1=Nashitomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q108616765}} (worshipped at {{ill|Noimi Shrine|ja|乃弥神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Noimi Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 乎彌神社|1=Omi Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11369800}}) == Shrine crest == * Left Mitsudomoe (三つ巴) == History == The shrine is traditionally said to have been founded during the reign of [[:en:Emperor Sujin|Emperor Sujin]]. It is identified as the small shrine "Omi Jinja" mentioned in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} for [[:en:Ika District, Shiga|Ika District]], [[:en:Ōmi Province|Omi Province]], and is classified as a {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|1=Shikinaisha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}} (disputed location).Other possible locations for the shrine include {{ill|Omi Shrine (Nagahama)|ja|大見神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Omi Shrine (Nagahama)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in Kinomoto Town, Nagahama, and {{ill|Kasuga Shrine (Nagahama)|ja|春日神社 (長浜市高月町宇根)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga Shrine (Nagahama)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in Takatsuki Town, Nagahama. The shrine also enshrines the deities of the {{ill|Noimi Shrine|ja|乃弥神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Noimi Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 乎彌神社|1=Omi Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11369800}}, another {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|1=Shikinaisha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}}. During the [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]], four shrines within the shrine parish—Murakusa Shrine, Hachiman Shrine, Daimyojin Shrine, and Seki Shrine—were relocated to the shrine grounds. It was designated as a {{ill|Village shrine|ja|村社|1=Son-sha|WD=Q134917284}}{{efn|Former shrine rank|lt=Son-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Village shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} under the old shrine Ranking system. == Festivals == * Main Festival: April 8 == Auxiliary shrines == * {{ill|Murakusa Shrine|ja|村草神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Murakusa Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Hachiman shrine|lt=Hachiman shrine|lt=Hachiman It is identified as the small shrine "Omi Jinja" mentioned in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} for [[:en:Ika District, Shiga|Ika District]], [[:en:Ōmi Province|Omi Province]], and is classified as a {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|1=Shikinaisha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}} (disputed location).Other possible locations for the shrine include {{ill|Omi Shrine (Nagahama)|ja|大見神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Omi Shrine (Nagahama)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in Kinomoto Town, Nagahama, and {{ill|Kasuga Shrine (Nagahama)|ja|春日神社 (長浜市高月町宇根)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga Shrine (Nagahama)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in Takatsuki Town, Nagahama. The shrine also enshrines the deities of the {{ill|Noimi Shrine|ja|乃弥神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Noimi Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 乎彌神社|1=Omi Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11369800}}, another {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|1=Shikinaisha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}}. During the [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]], four shrines within the shrine parish—Murakusa Shrine, Hachiman Shrine, Daimyojin Shrine, and Seki Shrine—were relocated to the shrine grounds. It was designated as a {{ill|Village shrine|ja|村社|1=Son-sha|WD=Q134917284}}{{efn|Former shrine rank|lt=Son-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Village shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} under the old shrine Ranking system. == Festivals == * Main Festival: April 8 == Auxiliary shrines == * {{ill|Murakusa Shrine|ja|村草神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Murakusa Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Hachiman shrine|lt=Hachiman shrine|lt=Hachiman Shrine|ja|八幡神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 八幡宮}} * {{ill|Daimyojin Shrine|ja|大名持神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daimyojin Shrine|1=Ōnamochi Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q43594663}} * {{ill|Seki Shrine|ja|塞神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seki Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} == References == {{reflist}} == External links == * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1267 Omi Shrine] (Shiga Prefecture Shrine Association) {{ja icon}} {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{translated page|ja|乎彌神社|version=93048962|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Omi Province]] [[Category:Son-sha in Shiga Prefecture]] }} [[image:Omi-jinja.JPG|center|250px]] [[ja:乎彌神社]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:Buildings in Nagahama, Shiga]] {{wikidata link|Q11369800}} [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]]
